mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, sku_id, quantity, selected) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, #{selected})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.sku_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, c.update_time, s.price AS sku_price, s.spec_desc AS sku_spec_desc, s.image AS sku_image, s.stock AS sku_stock, p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.main_image AS product_main_image FROM cart c LEFT JOIN sku s ON c.sku_id = s.id LEFT JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.sku_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, c.update_time, s.price AS sku_price, s.spec_desc AS sku_spec_desc, s.image AS sku_image, s.stock AS sku_stock, p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.main_image AS product_main_image FROM cart c LEFT JOIN sku s ON c.sku_id = s.id LEFT JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.selected = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
